title: Interest on this VC
description: Bulgaria has a well developed health tourism industry based upon 30-40 spa resorts, many of which were developed initially during the communist period and then more recently modernised. The majority of these spas are mountain (rather than coastal) resorts. One of the most well-known centres for mountain health / spa tourism is the Devin region in the Rhodope mountains.
